options.name: -P
options.description: Specifies the process value for the operating condition

options.name: -T
options.description: Specifies the temperature value for the operating condition

options.name: -V
options.description: Specifies the voltage value for the operating condition

options.name: -library_file
options.description: Specifies the library for which to create the virtual operating conditions

options.name: -name
options.description: Specifies the name for the operating condition being created
